case_title: LANDAU, KENNETH VS UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANDAU, KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A. DEFENDANT WAIVES VENUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
